name: Honey
howToGet: Can be obtained by inspecting sparkling flower beds. Dropped by Combee in its habitat.

name: Sturdy stick
howToGet: Can be picked up while exploring. Can also be obtained by using Cut on wooden objects. Dropped by Cacturne in its habitat.

name: Stone
howToGet: Can be picked up while exploring. Has a chance to drop when destroying natural blocks with Rock Smash. Dropped by Rock-type Pokemon with Litter specialty in their habitat.

name: Leaf
howToGet: Can be picked up while exploring. Can also be obtained by using Cut on tall grass and vines. Dropped by Venusaur in its habitat.

name: Small log
howToGet: Can be obtained by cutting down worn lumber or trees. Dropped by Haxorus in its habitat.

name: Vine rope
howToGet: Mainly obtained by using Cut on vines. Dropped by Bellsprout and Weepinbell in their habitat.

name: Glowing mushrooms
howToGet: Can be found inside caves.

name: Twine
howToGet: Can be obtained by breaking down textile garbage. Dropped by Bug-type Pokemon with Litter specialty in their habitats. Also obtained by cutting cobwebs.

name: Sea glass fragments
howToGet: Can be picked up while exploring Bleak Beach, usually found on muk-covered tiles.

name: Seashell
howToGet: Can be picked up while exploring the shoreline of Bleak Beach.

name: Nonburnable garbage
howToGet: Can be picked up while exploring Bleak Beach.

name: Squishy clay
howToGet: Can be obtained by breaking down clay blocks, which can easily be found inside Onix's cavern and on Bleak Beach. Dropped by Ground-type Pokemon with Litter specialty in their habitats.

name: Fluff
howToGet: Dropped by Mareep and Flaffy in their habitat.

name: Wastepaper
howToGet: Can be picked up while exploring the Sparkling Skylands.

name: Copper ore
howToGet: Can be obtained by breaking down Copper ore blocks in the Rocky Ridge mines.

name: Iron ore
howToGet: Can be obtained by breaking down Iron ore blocks in the Rocky Ridge mines. Can also be obtained by giving Nonburnable garbage to Pokemon with the Recycle specialty.

name: Gold ore
howToGet: Can be obtained by breaking down Gold ore blocks in the Rocky Ridge mines.

name: Pokemetal fragment
howToGet: Can be obtained by breaking down Pokemetal ore blocks in the Withered Wasteland mines and Sparkling Skylands.

name: Rare Pokemetal fragment
howToGet: Has a low chance of dropping from Pokemetal blocks.

name: Crystal fragment
howToGet: Can be obtained by breaking down large crystals in the Rocky Ridge mines.

name: Lumber
howToGet: Can be obtained by having Scyther, or any Pokemon with the Chop specialty, process Small lumber (small logs).

name: Brick
howToGet: Can be obtained by having any Pokemon with the Burn specialty process Squishy clay.

name: Copper ingot
howToGet: Can be obtained by melting Copper ore in the smelting furnace.

name: Iron ingot
howToGet: Can be obtained by melting Iron ore in the smelting furnace.

name: Gold ingot
howToGet: Can be obtained by melting Gold ore in the smelting furnace.

name: Pokemetal
howToGet: Can be obtained by melting Pokemetal fragment in the smelting furnace.

name: Rare Pokemetal
howToGet: Can be obtained by melting Rare Pokemetal fragment in the smelting furnace.

name: Glass
howToGet: Melt volcanic ash, sand, or sandstone in a smelting furnace with Pokemon with the Burn specialty. Can also be obtained by breaking broken windows.

name: Concrete
howToGet: Can be obtained by processing Limestone, found on Rocky Ridges, in a Concrete Mixer, which is unlocked in Sparkling Skylands.

name: Paper
howToGet: Can be obtained by giving Wastepaper to Pokemon with the Recycle specialty.

name: Tinkagear
howToGet: Can be obtained by giving Iron Ingots to Tinkaton for processing.

name: Strange strings
howToGet: Has a low chance of dropping from glowing blocks.

name: Armor fragment
howToGet: Has a low chance of dropping from glowing blocks.

name: Stardust
howToGet: Can be picked up while exploring Dream Islands.

name: Red paint
howToGet: Can be obtained by giving a Leppa Berry to a Pokemon with the Crush specialty.

name: Blue paint
howToGet: Can be obtained by giving a Chesto Berry to a Pokemon with the Crush specialty.

name: Green paint
howToGet: Can be obtained by giving a Lum Berry to a Pokemon with the Crush specialty.

name: Yellow paint
howToGet: Can be obtained by giving an Aspear Berry to a Pokemon with the Crush specialty.

name: Pink paint
howToGet: Can be obtained by giving a Pecha Berry to a Pokemon with the Crush specialty.

name: Cyan paint
howToGet: Can be obtained by giving a Rawst Berry to a Pokemon with the Crush specialty.

name: White paint
howToGet: Has a low chance of obtaining after giving a Leppa Berry to a Pokemon with the Crush specialty.

name: Black paint
howToGet: Has a low chance of obtaining after giving an Aspear Berry to a Pokemon with the Crush specialty.

name: Cotton spores
howToGet: Found on Dream Islands during the Hoppip event.

name: Leppa Berry
howToGet: Obtained from Berry Trees. Plant Leppa seeds in soil to grow Leppa trees. Can be given to Pokemon with Crush specialty to make Red or White paint.

name: Chesto Berry
howToGet: Obtained from Berry Trees. Plant Chesto seeds in soil to grow Chesto trees. Can be given to Pokemon with Crush specialty to make Blue paint.

name: Rawst Berry
howToGet: Obtained from Berry Trees. Plant Rawst seeds in soil to grow Rawst trees. Can be given to Pokemon with Crush specialty to make Cyan paint.

name: Aspear Berry
howToGet: Obtained from Berry Trees. Plant Aspear seeds in soil to grow Aspear trees. Can be given to Pokemon with Crush specialty to make Yellow or Black paint.

name: Pecha Berry
howToGet: Obtained from Berry Trees. Plant Pecha seeds in soil to grow Pecha trees. Can be given to Pokemon with Crush specialty to make Pink paint.

name: Lum Berry
howToGet: Obtained from Berry Trees. Plant Lum seeds in soil to grow Lum trees. Can be given to Pokemon with Crush specialty to make Green paint.

name: Bean
howToGet: Found growing in Withered Wasteland on a hill directly west of the Pokemon Center. Can be grown from Bean seeds in a field (water required). Bean seeds can be bought at the Pokemon Center shop for 50 Life Coins per set of five. Use Rototiller to collect the whole plant, or Rock Smash on the block to get the seed.

name: Tomato
howToGet: Found growing in Bleak Beach. Can be grown from Tomato seeds in a field (water required). Tomato seeds obtained by using Cut on planted Tomato crops.

name: Wheat
howToGet: Found growing in Rocky Ridges. Can be grown from Wheat seeds in a field (water required). Wheat seeds obtained by using Cut on planted Wheat crops.

name: Potato
howToGet: Can be grown from Potato seeds in a field.

name: Fresh Carrot
howToGet: Randomly obtained when pulling sprouts from the ground.

name: Seaweed
howToGet: Found laying on any beach shoreline.

name: Cave Mushrooms
howToGet: Found in caves and Rocky Ridges, in damp places and under shady trees.

name: Bruised Berry
howToGet: Given by Chef Dente.

name: Curry And Rice
howToGet: Cook in the Giant Cooking Pot.

name: Fresh Water
howToGet: Randomly obtained from Vending Machines.

name: Soda Pop
howToGet: Randomly obtained from Vending Machines.

name: Moomoo Milk Coffee
howToGet: Randomly obtained from Vending Machines.

name: Roserade Tea
howToGet: Randomly obtained from Vending Machines.

name: Chili Sauce
howToGet: Randomly obtained from Vending Machines.

name: Pizza
howToGet: Reward from the Eevee Special Challenge: build 15 structures at Palette Town. The recipe can also appear in the PC Shop at the Pokemon Center; craft at any workbench using 1 Pokemetal.

name: Fried Potatoes
howToGet: Crafted via cooking recipe using ingredients.

name: Soda Float
howToGet: Crafted via cooking recipe using ingredients.

name: Afternoon Tea Set
howToGet: Crafted via cooking recipe using ingredients.

name: Chocolate Cookies
howToGet: Crafted via cooking recipe using ingredients.

name: Sandwiches
howToGet: Crafted via cooking recipe using ingredients.

name: Shaved Ice
howToGet: Crafted via cooking recipe using ingredients.

name: Ribbon Cake
howToGet: Crafted via cooking recipe using ingredients.

name: Tomato seeds
howToGet: Obtained by using Cut on planted Tomato crops in the overworld. First Tomatoes are found growing in Bleak Beach. Plant in a field (tilled soil), water with Water Gun or a Pokemon with Water specialty, to grow Tomatoes.

name: Bean seeds
howToGet: Obtained by using Rock Smash on the block where a Bean plant is planted, or by using Cut. Can also be purchased at the Pokemon Center shop for 50 Life Coins per set of five. Plant in a field (tilled soil) and water to grow Beans.

name: Wheat seeds
howToGet: Obtained by using Cut on planted Wheat crops. First Wheat is found growing in Rocky Ridges. Plant in a field (tilled soil) and water to grow Wheat.

name: Potato seeds
howToGet: Plant in a field (tilled soil) and water to grow Potatoes.

name: Leppa seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow Leppa berry trees.

name: Chesto seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow Chesto berry trees.

name: Rawst seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow Rawst berry trees.

name: Aspear seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow Aspear berry trees.

name: Pecha seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow Pecha berry trees.

name: Lum seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow Lum berry trees.

name: Palm seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow palm trees.

name: Pointy-tree seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow pointy trees.

name: Wildflower seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow wildflowers.

name: Seashore-flower seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow beach/seashore flowers.

name: Mountain-flower seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow mountain flowers.

name: Skyland-flower seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow skyland flowers.

name: Beautiful-flower seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow beautiful flowers.

name: Cute-flower seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow cute flowers.

name: Elegant-flower seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow elegant flowers.

name: Robust-flower seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow robust flowers.

name: Adorable-hedge seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow adorable hedges.

name: Healthy-hedge seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow healthy hedges.

name: Damp-hedge seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow damp hedges.

name: Stylish-hedge seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow stylish hedges.

name: Square-plant seeds
howToGet: Plant in soil to grow square plants/bushes.

name: Tall grass
howToGet: Found naturally throughout the overworld. Can also be spawned by using the Leafage move on dirt. Yellow variant grows by the seaside, Red variant grows on volcanoes and mountains, Pink variant is found at the Skylands.

name: Wildflowers
howToGet: Grown from Wildflower seeds planted in soil.

name: Seashore flowers
howToGet: Grown from Seashore-flower seeds planted in soil.

name: Mountain flowers
howToGet: Grown from Mountain-flower seeds planted in soil.

name: Skyland flowers
howToGet: Grown from Skyland-flower seeds planted in soil.

name: Simple Salad
howToGet: Cooked using: Leaf x1 + Any Ingredient x1. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Leppa Salad
howToGet: Cooked using: Leaf x1 + Leppa Berry x1. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Seaweed Salad
howToGet: Cooked using: Leaf x1 + Seaweed x1. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Shredded Salad
howToGet: Cooked using: Leaf x1 + Any Ingredient x1. Requires partner Pokemon with Chop specialty. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Crushed-Berry Salad
howToGet: Cooked using: Leaf x1 + Chesto Berry x1. Requires partner Pokemon with Crush specialty. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Crouton Salad
howToGet: Cooked using: Leaf x1 + Any type of Bread x1. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Simple Soup
howToGet: Cooked using: Fresh Water x1 + Any Ingredients x2. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Seaweed Soup
howToGet: Cooked using: Fresh Water x1 + Seaweed x1 + Any Ingredient x1. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Mushroom Soup
howToGet: Cooked using: Fresh Water x1 + Cave Mushrooms x1 + Any Ingredient x1. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Electrifying Soup
howToGet: Cooked using: Fresh Water x1 + Any Ingredients x2. Requires partner Pokemon with Generate specialty. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Healthy Soup
howToGet: Cooked using: Fresh Water x1 + Bean x1 + Leaf x1. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Flavorful Soup
howToGet: Cooked using: Fresh Water x1 + Any type of Burger Steak x1 + Aspear Berry x1. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Simple Bread
howToGet: Cooked using: Wheat x1 + Any Ingredients x2. Powers up Cut when eaten.

name: Leppa Bread
howToGet: Cooked using: Wheat x1 + Leppa Berry x1 + Any Ingredient x1. Powers up Cut when eaten.

name: Carrot Bread
howToGet: Cooked using: Wheat x1 + Fresh Carrot x1 + Any Ingredient x1. Powers up Cut when eaten.

name: Recycled Bread
howToGet: Cooked using: Wheat x1 + Any type of Bread x1 + Any Ingredient x1. Requires partner Pokemon with Recycle specialty. Powers up Cut when eaten.

name: Fluffy Bread
howToGet: Cooked using: Wheat x1 + Pecha Berry x1 + Any Ingredient x1. Requires partner Pokemon with Water specialty. Powers up Cut when eaten.

name: Bread Bowl
howToGet: Cooked using: Wheat x1 + Any type of Soup x1 + Any Ingredient x1. Requires partner Pokemon with Burn specialty. Powers up Cut when eaten.

name: Simple Hamburger Steak
howToGet: Cooked using: Bean x1 + Any Ingredients x3. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten.

name: Mushroom Hamburger Steak
howToGet: Cooked using: Bean x1 + Cave Mushrooms x1 + Any Ingredients x2. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten.

name: Tomato Hamburger Steak
howToGet: Cooked using: Bean x1 + Tomato x1 + Any Ingredients x2. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten.

name: Potato Hamburger Steak
howToGet: Cooked using: Bean x1 + Potato x1 + Any Ingredients x2. Powers up Rock Smash a lot when eaten.

name: Bitter Hamburger Steak
howToGet: Cooked using: Bean x1 + Rawst Berry x1 + Lum Berry x1 + Any Ingredient x1. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten.

name: Vibrant Hamburger Steak
howToGet: Cooked using: Bean x1 + Any type of Salad x1 + Potato x1 + Any Ingredient x1. Powers up Rock Smash a lot when eaten.
